summary: Tested three fixes: Share Review modal on More page and My Account, Integrations page Docs tab syntax fix, and daily lifecycle scan scheduler job. All tests PASSED.

more_page_quick_tiles.details: 3 quick tiles visible: My Digital Card, Congrats Card, Share Review

more_page_share_review_tile.details: Clicking Share Review tile opens modal (not navigating to settings page)

share_review_modal_elements.details: Modal has: Title, Review URL (app.imosapp.com/review/), Copy Link, Text, Email, Preview, Manage Review Platform Links buttons

my_account_quick_actions.details: Quick Actions tiles visible on My Account page

my_account_share_review_button.details: Share Review Link button visible below Quick Actions tiles

my_account_share_modal.details: Clicking Share Review Link opens same share modal with Copy Link, Text, Email, Preview buttons

integrations_docs_tab.details: Docs tab renders without errors (syntax error was fixed)

integrations_docs_sections.details: Getting Started, Base URL, Authentication, Rate Limits sections visible

integrations_docs_subtabs.details: Sub-tabs: Start, Endpoints, Webhooks, Examples, Zapier all working

scheduler_status.details: Shows 3 jobs: daily_lifecycle_scan (6 AM UTC), daily_date_triggers (8 AM UTC), campaign_step_processor (15 min)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Review modal implemented on both More page (tile) and My Account (button). Opens modal with Copy Link, Text, Email, Preview buttons and Manage Review Platform Links. URL format: https://app.imosapp.com/review/{storeSlug}?sp={userId}. Integrations Docs tab fixed and working with all sub-tabs. Scheduler has 3 jobs including daily_lifecycle_scan at 6 AM UTC.
